TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Xincheng (Sincima go, śĖįŚüéťĄČ) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.83 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.22 km¬≤), 16,246 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 6,110 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,380 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 33%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Xincheng ays psgayun 8 ru 12 alang. 12 alang hani ga, Pacidal , Paudadan (Ś§ßŚĺ∑ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Lalumaang , Palamitan , Kaliyawan , Cilapuk , Sudadatan , Pibutingan , Hupu , Katanka , Pabuisan , Palinkaan .
S.PHON: xin ¶~ ®ńßeŇč (s~…ēin ¶~ ®ima …£o, ***) mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a * km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), **,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. s~…ēinpŇčan s~…ēeńßu s~…ē Ēuli s~…ēku s~…ēańßuj …£o. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u xin ¶~ ®ńßeŇč ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, pa ¶~ ®i*al , pau*a*an (** **), lalumaaŇč , palamitan , kalijawan , ¶~ ®ilapuk , s~…ēu*a*atan , piő≤utiŇčan , ńßupu , katanka , paő≤uis~…ēan , palinkaan .
S.FORM: Xincheng (Sincima go, śĖįŚüéťĄČ) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.83 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.22 km¬≤), 16,246 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 6,110 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,380 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 33%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Xincheng ays psgayun 8 ru 12 alang. 12 alang hani ga, Pacidal , Paudadan (Ś§ßŚĺ∑ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Lalumaang , Palamitan , Kaliyawan , Cilapuk , Sudadatan , Pibutingan , Hupu , Katanka , Pabuisan , Palinkaan .
